# Huntington Beach Prosthodontics

> Board-certified prosthodontist serving Huntington Beach, CA and the surrounding Orange County area. Specializing in dental implants, All-on-X full arch restorations, porcelain veneers, dentures, and comprehensive smile makeovers.

## Practice Information

- **Practice name**: Huntington Beach Prosthodontics
- **Specialty**: Prosthodontics (ADA-recognized dental specialty)
- **Doctor**: Dr. Favian Cheong, Board-Certified Prosthodontist
- **Address**: 16141 Bolsa Chica St., Suite C, Huntington Beach, CA 92649
- **Phone**: (714) 846-1386
- **Website**: https://hbimplants.com
- **Hours**: Mon/Wed/Fri 9am–5pm, Sat 10am–2pm

## Services

- **Dental Implants** — single tooth, multiple teeth, implant-supported restorations
- **All-on-4 / All-on-6 / Full Arch** — complete arch replacement on 4–6 implants
- **Porcelain Veneers** — ultra-thin cosmetic shells, smile makeovers
- **Implant Restorations** — crowns, bridges, and dentures anchored to implants
- **Dentures** — full and partial, conventional and implant-supported
- **Snap-On Dentures** — removable implant-retained overdentures
- **Cosmetic Dentistry** — teeth whitening, bonding
- **Restorative Dentistry** — crowns, bridges
- **Clear Aligners** — orthodontic alignment

## About Prosthodontics

A prosthodontist is a dental specialist who completes 3 additional years of post-doctoral residency training beyond dental school, dedicated exclusively to the restoration and replacement of teeth. Prosthodontists are the recognized specialists for dental implants, full-arch reconstruction, complex cosmetic cases, and complete mouth rehabilitation.

## Service Area

Huntington Beach, Fountain Valley, Costa Mesa, Newport Beach, Seal Beach, and surrounding Orange County, California communities.
